creator: lifanov@mail.lifanov.com
text:
Created attachment 144500
games/tome4 1.2.2 -> 1.2.3

Please update games/tome4 to 1.2.3.

This includes Mindslayer rebalancing and a multitude of bugfixes.
Saved games from 1.2.2 should be compatible.

Changelog: http://te4.org/blogs/darkgod/2014/07/news/tales-majeyal-123-aka-competitive-ecology-released

Port change: dynamically set PORTVERSION in pkg-plist for files that have it in the filename. This should make future diffs shorter.

Tested on:
runtime: 10.0-RELEASE amd64
build: 8x Redports success
